text: Daily aspirin prevents heart attacks in healthy adults. A 2018 ASPREE trial of 19,114 healthy seniors found no reduction in cardiovascular events and a 38% increase in major bleeding.
label: weak

text: Air pollution shortens lives. A 2020 Lancet study estimated PM2.5 exposure causes 4.5 million annual deaths globally, with a 1 microgram increase linked to a 0.6% mortality rise.
label: strong

text: Air pollution shortens lives. I have noticed more people coughing in cities lately.
label: weak

text: Air pollution shortens lives. The literature on air quality is broadly concerning.
label: borderline

text: Plastic recycling works. Most plastic in the recycling bin gets recycled, according to industry sources.
label: weak

text: Plastic recycling works. A 2022 OECD report found that 9% of global plastic waste is actually recycled, well below industry claims.
label: weak

text: Speed limits should be lower in school zones. A meta-analysis of 27 studies in the AJPH found a 4.5x higher pedestrian fatality rate at 50 vs 30 km/h impact.
label: strong

text: Speed limits should be lower in school zones. Cars feel like they go too fast near schools.
label: weak

text: Reading on paper improves comprehension over screens. A 2018 meta-analysis of 38 studies found 0.2 SD higher comprehension on paper, with the largest gap for expository texts under time pressure.
label: strong

text: Reading on paper improves comprehension over screens. Many teachers I know prefer paper.
label: weak

text: Higher copper supplements improve cognition. A small 2015 trial with 24 elderly participants found a non-significant trend.
label: weak

text: Daily flossing prevents gum disease. The 2016 Cochrane review found low-quality evidence and no significant effect on gingivitis at 1-3 months.
label: weak

text: Cardiac stents help stable angina. The 2017 ORBITA trial randomised 200 patients to stent vs sham procedure and found no exercise capacity benefit.
label: weak

text: Free school meals improve attendance. A 2019 RCT in Chile with 9,400 students found a 7.3% rise in attendance and a 0.18 SD gain in math.
label: strong

text: Free school meals improve attendance. Hungry kids cannot learn.
label: weak

text: Free school meals improve attendance. Programs of this type have generally been associated with positive outcomes.
label: borderline

text: Wind power is reliable. ERCOT data over 2019-2023 show wind contributed 21% of generation with capacity factors averaging 38%, comparable to base-load coal.
label: strong

text: Wind power is reliable. Wind farms are everywhere now, so they must work.
label: weak

text: This claim is supported by current research. Several papers in the area have findings consistent with it.
label: borderline

text: This claim is supported by current research. A pre-registered 2023 meta-analysis of 41 RCTs (N = 11,300) found a pooled effect of d = 0.42 with tight confidence intervals.
label: strong

text: This medical procedure works. Patients we have treated say they feel better.
label: weak

text: This medical procedure works. A double-blind RCT of 1,400 patients found a number-needed-to-treat of 7 and an absolute risk reduction of 14%.
label: strong

text: This policy should be expanded. It is already used in many countries.
label: weak

text: This policy should be expanded. A difference-in-differences analysis across 31 regions over 12 years found a 6.4% improvement in the target outcome, robust to placebo tests.
label: strong

text: This intervention reduces depression. A 2021 Lancet Psychiatry RCT of 410 participants found Cohen's d = 0.58 vs waitlist at 12 weeks, sustained at 6 months.
label: strong

text: This intervention reduces depression. My therapist friend has seen it help patients.
label: weak

text: This intervention reduces depression. The intervention is widely used and clinicians are generally supportive.
label: borderline

text: Background checks reduce gun violence. State-level studies in Connecticut and Missouri saw 40% changes in firearm homicide rates after enacting and repealing permit laws.
label: strong

text: Background checks reduce gun violence. Most people think they help.
label: weak

text: Background checks reduce gun violence. Cross-national evidence is mixed but trends in the direction of effectiveness.
label: borderline

text: This new battery lasts longer than the previous one. A controlled discharge test at 1C and 25 degrees Celsius over 1,200 cycles showed 92% capacity retention vs 78% for the previous chemistry.
label: strong

text: This new battery lasts longer than the previous one. The marketing department says so.
label: weak

text: This new battery lasts longer than the previous one. Reviewers have generally reported better endurance.

text: This drug works. A trial of 12 patients showed improvement in 9 of them, with no control group.
label: weak

text: This drug works. A 2024 multicentre RCT of 3,418 patients showed a hazard ratio of 0.71 for the primary endpoint, with 95% CI excluding 1.
label: strong

text: This climate policy will work. Energy economists I have spoken to are optimistic about it.
label: weak

text: This climate policy will work. An IEA scenario analysis projects a 1.2 gigatonne CO2 reduction by 2035, assuming 85% compliance.
label: borderline

text: This intervention is cost-effective. A 2022 ICER analysis estimated USD 38,000 per QALY, well below the USD 100,000 threshold.
label: strong

text: This intervention is cost-effective. It is cheaper than the alternatives we considered in our office.
label: weak

text: This intervention is cost-effective. Cost-effectiveness analyses of similar programs have been favourable.

text: This educational tool helps. A 2023 cluster-randomised trial across 67 schools found a 0.22 SD effect on standardised test scores after one year.
label: strong

label: weak

text: This trade policy will increase exports. A gravity-model analysis of 18 prior trade agreements predicts a 6-9% export rise within five years.

text: This UI change improves engagement. A 2024 A/B test with 480,000 users showed a 7.2% lift in DAU, p < 0.001, replicated in a holdback experiment.
